# langfuse_scim_user (Resource)

Manages a Langfuse SCIM user. Requires an organization-scoped API key with SCIM permissions.

> **Note:** `password` is write-only and cannot be recovered via import.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "langfuse_scim_user" "example" {
  user_name   = "jane.doe@example.com"
  email       = "jane.doe@example.com"
  given_name  = "Jane"
  family_name = "Doe"
  active      = true
  password    = var.initial_password
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `email` (String) The primary email address of the user. Changing this creates a new user.
- `user_name` (String) The username (typically an email address). Changing this creates a new user.

### Optional

- `active` (Boolean) Whether the user is active. Defaults to `true`.
- `external_id` (String) An optional external identifier for the user. Changing this creates a new user.
- `family_name` (String) The family (last) name of the user. Changing this creates a new user.
- `given_name` (String) The given (first) name of the user. Changing this creates a new user.
- `password` (String, Sensitive) The initial password for the user. Write-only; not read back from the API.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the SCIM user.
